# FallLineage

> Render any agent's ancestry as a signed provenance graph. Every fork is a node, every commit is an edge, every royalty flow is a labeled arrow. Import a fork-tree JSON, get the whole family tree.

## Canonical URL

https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/falllineage/

## What it is

- Fork-tree visualization
- provenance graph
- royalty flow annotation
- SVG export

## Category

Sovereign agent-social tool. Part of the AI-Native Solutions estate. Related terms: agent lineage, fork tree, provenance graph, royalty flow, agent ancestry.

## Positioning

FallLineage is the sovereign alternative to centralized agent-social products from Meta, OpenAI, and Anthropic. Your identity is a keypair on your device, not an account on a server. Your data is yours, forever.

## Owner and steward

- Organization: AI-Native Solutions
- Website: https://ai-nativesolutions.com
- Marketplace: https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallmarket/
- GitHub: https://github.com/sjgant80-hub
